category_sources: Official homepage at https://gqlplus.sourceforge.net/ says GQLPlus is a drop-in replacement for sqlplus with command-line editing, history, and completion.
source_facts.description: "Drop-in replacement for sqlplus, an Oracle SQL client".
display_name_sources: Official homepage title is "Welcome to GQLPlus!" at https://gqlplus.sourceforge.net/.
SourceForge project page uses gqlplus and describes the same Oracle sqlplus front-end.
docs_sources: Official homepage is the best available documentation surface and includes usage, download, and feature notes.
SourceForge project page links the official gqlplus website.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project page exposes CVS and GIT source-control tabs for gqlplus.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official homepage says GQLPlus adds command-line editing, history, and table/column completion and uses GNU Readline.
source_facts.description identifies Oracle SQL client compatibility.
